images.title: 2007.09 - 'Wide view with sun and white clouds', over the shore and quite surf near Petit-Dalle in Normandy France with a quiet sea; French landscape photography, Fons Heijnsbroek (10544469433).jpg
images.description:
Photo of French landscape - a wide view and sunny seascape with light clouds and quite surf over the stony shore near Petit-Dalle in Normandy, France - with a quiet sea during late Summer 2007.

French rocky seascape and beach photo - coast & landscape photography in France by Fons Heijnsbroek, photo in September 2007.

images.title: 2007.09 - 'Low view in southern direction on the cliff walls', and the rocky beach near Petit-Dalle in Normandy France with a quiet sea; French landscape photography, Fons Heijnsbroek (10543193593).jpg
images.description:
Frech landscape photo - a shore-scape with a low view in southern direction on the cliff walls and over the rocky beach with pebbles and stones near Petit-Dalle in Normandy France - with a blue and white cloudy sky in late Summer of 2007. I loved to take the photo at the base of the cliff wall, with a direct view over the shore with its characteristic pebbles, surf and sand.

French seascape photo - coast & landscape photography in France by Fons Heijnsbroek, photo in September 2007.

images.title: 2007.09 - 'Still life seascape of light and shadows', a splashing surf on rocks on the shores of Petit-Dalle in Normandy France with a quiet sea; French landscape photography, Fons Heijnsbroek (10542484115).jpg
images.description:
Frech seascape photo - a view of light and shadows over a wild sunny surf splashing on small rocks on the beach, near Petit-Dalle in Normandy France - a still life seascape with sun and a light cloudy sky, during late Summer of 2007. I loved to take the photo at the beach level, with a view from the shore with its characteristic stones, rocks, rolling pebbles and sand.

French seascape photo - coast & landscape photography in France by Fons Heijnsbroek, photo in September 2007.
